Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answer To Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And For Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Catherine Walsh In Support Thereof; [Proposed] Order
Off Calendar Mar-11-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Roger E. Jackson, Esq., Telephone 707-318-2994, appearing for Defendant Emerald Kagemoto;
No other appearance.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT EMERALD WONG KAGEMOTO'S Motion To Compel Answer To Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And For Sanctions.

Defendant's unopposed motion to compel responses to form interrogatories, requests for production of documents, and special interrogatories from Plaintiff Van Luong is Granted. Plaintiff shall produce code-compliant responses to Defendant's form interrogatories, requests for production of documents, and special interrogatories no later than March 21, 2019. Defendant's request for sanctions is denied.

Order is signed

Judge Pro Tem: Conor Moore; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
